function.message: I can’t fully complete this inbox request yet because the request lists five OCR targets, but only four source files are available. Please provide or correct the fifth file entry, then I can complete the OCR migration cleanly.

function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md requires OCR of five purchase records. Four listed records were readable and contain bill data, but the fifth listed entry was not retrievable and was not found in a follow-up find query, so completing the full requested set would require partial completion/guessing. Per inbox and workflow rules, stop without mutations and request clarification.
